pre-commit.name: swiftlint-check
pre-commit.description: Run SwiftLint on changed Swift files to catch violations before commit
pre-commit.command: cd ios-app/PTPerformance && swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml --quiet --reporter emoji 2>&1 | head -20

pre-commit.name: no-hardcoded-credentials
pre-commit.description: Scan for hardcoded secrets, API keys, or passwords in staged Swift files
pre-commit.command: git diff --cached --name-only -- '*.swift' | xargs grep -n -i -E '(password|secret|private_key|api_key|bearer|token)\s*[:=]\s*"[^"]{8,}"' 2>/dev/null && echo 'FAIL: Hardcoded credentials detected in staged files' && exit 1 || true

pre-commit.name: no-env-files
pre-commit.command: git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '^\.env$|\.env\.local$|\.env\..+\.local$' && echo 'FAIL: .env file staged for commit' && exit 1 || true

pre-commit.name: no-phi-in-logs
pre-commit.description: Check for patient health information in print/NSLog statements
pre-commit.command: git diff --cached -- '*.swift' | grep -E '^\+.*((print|NSLog|os_log)\(.*(email|firstName|lastName|patient\.name|healthData))' && echo 'FAIL: PHI detected in logging statement' && exit 1 || true

pre-testflight.name: verify-build-succeeds
pre-testflight.description: Full Xcode build must succeed before TestFlight upload
pre-testflight.command: cd ios-app/PTPerformance && xcodebuild -scheme PTPerformance -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' build 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'BUILD SUCCEEDED'

pre-testflight.name: unit-tests-pass
pre-testflight.description: All unit tests must pass before TestFlight upload
pre-testflight.command: cd ios-app/PTPerformance && xcodebuild test -scheme PTPerformance -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' -only-testing:PTPerformanceTests 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'TEST SUCCEEDED\|\*\* TEST SUCCEEDED \*\*'

pre-testflight.name: ui-tests-pass
pre-testflight.description: All XCUITests must pass before TestFlight upload
pre-testflight.command: cd ios-app/PTPerformance && xcodebuild test -scheme PTPerformance -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' -only-testing:PTPerformanceUITests 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'TEST SUCCEEDED\|\*\* TEST SUCCEEDED \*\*'

pre-testflight.name: version-bumped
pre-testflight.description: Build number must be higher than the last TestFlight build

pre-testflight.name: no-pending-migrations
pre-testflight.description: All Supabase migrations must be applied before TestFlight
pre-testflight.command: ls supabase/migrations/_pending/*.sql 2>/dev/null && echo 'FAIL: Pending migrations found in supabase/migrations/_pending/' && exit 1 || echo 'OK: No pending migrations'

pre-testflight.name: swiftlint-clean
pre-testflight.description: No SwiftLint violations in the full codebase
pre-testflight.command: cd ios-app/PTPerformance && swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml --quiet 2>&1 | grep -c 'error\|warning' | grep -q '^0$' || (echo 'FAIL: SwiftLint violations found' && exit 1)
